name: shhh-storefront
description: Shhh storefront. The .jsx files are the source of truth; tools/build.mjs precompiles them (Babel, at build time) into a Babel-free, production-React bundle for deployment. Edit .jsx, push to main, CI builds + deploys to gh-pages.

scripts.deploy: node tools/build.mjs && node tools/prerender.mjs && node tools/smoke.mjs
